title: Add DeepFloor non-record submission candidate
author: KenMalloy

data.description: Uses repeated recurrent blocks instead of a large flat stack, with multi-view recurrent computation and cross-token floor attention / fused recurrent accumulator modes.
Introduces two cross-token modes: periodic floor attention or a fused recurrent accumulator.
Explicit stability controls for recurrent training, including contraction target, decay, TBPTT chunking, Jacobian penalty, periodic normalization, and optional HiPPO-style fused state cores.
Frozen record-folder submission snapshot so the submission entrypoint runs without importing mutable repo-root code.

novel_contributions: Compact recurrent multi-view language model for the Parameter Golf challenge
Repeated QKV+O recurrent blocks with depth recurrence
Two cross-token modes: periodic floor attention and fused recurrent accumulator
Explicit stability controls for recurrent optimization and training
Frozen submission snapshot for cold-pod and remote validation reproducibility
